profile.personality: A deeply physically reactive constitution where emotional and environmental stresses manifest immediately in the glandular system, particularly the breasts. The Phytolacca patient is restless and uncomfortable, caught between sensitivity to both heat and cold, never finding a comfortable state—analogous to the mercurial temperament but rooted in a slower, more indurative process.
profile.mental_state: Kent explicitly notes that the mental symptoms have not been fully brought out in provings, leaving this area fragmentary. What emerges indirectly is a state of dull, heavy suffering with bone-deep weariness, worsening at night and from warmth of the bed, producing a restless inability to find relief. The patient may feel dizzy and sick when trying to sit up, suggesting a mental fog and prostration under acute illness.
profile.emotional_pattern: Every emotional shock—fear, fright, accident, or tribulation—translates directly into physical glandular inflammation rather than being processed psychologically. This somatization pattern suggests a constitution that suppresses or bypasses emotional expression, channeling distress into the body. There is an underlying vulnerability and hypersensitivity to upset, where even modest excitement produces disproportionate physical consequences.

rubric_passages.Chest: It seems that the remedy centres in the mammary glands. Soreness and lumps in the breasts from each cold, damp spell; becomes chilled and a sore breast results; sore breast in connection with the menses; a nursing woman is exposed to the cold, the breast inflames and the milk becomes stringy; coagulated milk.

profile.personality: A mentally and physically exhausted individual who has been worn down by intellectual overwork, grief, or depressing emotions. They present as profoundly indifferent to their surroundings, lacking willpower and motivation, preferring to lie down and avoid all exertion. They seek cool air and rest, and are averse to conversation, thinking, or any form of engagement with the world.
profile.mental_state: The defining feature is severe brain fag — complete mental prostration from the slightest intellectual effort, with inability to study, read, or concentrate without triggering headaches, spinal burning, and physical collapse. There is progressive cognitive deterioration suggesting softening of brain and cord, with loss of interest in all things and an inability to sustain any mental work. The mind is weakened to the point where willpower fails entirely, and even controlling one's own impulses becomes impossible.
profile.emotional_pattern: Extreme indifference and apathy dominate, with irritability surfacing only when forced into mental exertion. There is a deep vulnerability to grief and depressing emotions, which act as exciting causes of the entire symptom picture. Beneath the flat affect lies a loss of self-mastery, where the exhausted mind can no longer regulate emotional or sexual impulses, producing a paradoxical coexistence of profound apathy with uncontrolled excitability.

rubric_passages.Back: Burning heat in the spine from mental or physical exertion. Weakness of the spine and heaviness of the limbs, especially the lower limbs. The back is so tired that he cannot sit up erect, he must slide down in the chair or lie down.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Weakness of the lower limbs with trembling, numbness and constriction. Formication and prickling as from needles. Marked coldness of the feet. Physical exertion greatly intensifies all these symptoms after long rest he is ameliorated.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Numbness of many parts, trembling, lassitude, heaviness, must lie down, worse from least exertion are marked features.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: Tired after least exertion in limbs and whole body; excessive lassitude. Great muscular weakness.
rubric_passages.Head: It has violent pain in vertex, forehead and occiput, extending down the spine with much heat. Congestive headaches. The head must be cool, it is worse from warm room, and wrapping up the head or body, and better from rest of mind and body.
rubric_passages.Mind: It is a typical brain-fag remedy with indifference and lack of will power, aversion to talk, think, or perform any mental exertion. He is quickly prostrated from the least mental work, and it brings on many complaints, such as soreness and lameness, diarrhea, burning along the spine, general weakness and heaviness of limbs and back.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Yellow, watery or thin faecal, oily stool; smarting after stool; stool like yellow cornmeal gruel. Great weakness after stool, in debilitated persons.
rubric_passages.Sleep: Sleepiness in day-time and sleepless at night, especially after mental labor.

rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: The weakness of body and mind is the first impression wrought upon the mind of the reader who goes carefully over this proving. It is progressive, passing from weariness to paralysis.

profile.personality: A proud, haughty woman who overestimates herself and looks down on others as inferior. She is hysterical in temperament, prone to dramatic mood swings between mania and melancholy, and her symptoms arise from wounded pride, fright, or prolonged emotional excitement.
profile.mental_state: Dominated by delusions of grandeur—she imagines herself high-born, her body larger than others, and that she does not belong to her race. She broods in corners, talks of fanciful things, and may become insane over religious matters or descend into sexual perversion with unchaste speech. Mental symptoms characteristically alternate with physical symptoms such as numbness and spasms.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deeply fearful yet contemptuous—she dreads that something terrible will happen and fears death while simultaneously loathing life. She is intensely irritable over trifles, weeps easily, and is restless with constant palpitation and trembling at the slightest excitement. Any disturbance to her pride or any sexual excitement triggers the full cascade of her symptoms.

rubric_passages.Chill: Coldness, crawling, and numbness of the skin, especially during fever.
rubric_passages.Chill, trembling and shivering: Palpitation, trembling in all limbs during every little excitement, fears death and loathes life.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Compressing sensations, pressing pains, pressure of the limbs as if bandaged or constricted, tension of the skin of the limbs as if bandaged.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Extreme sexual erethism is found in both male and female. Such extreme sensitiveness of the external genitals that it is impossible for the woman to wear a napkin during menstruation. Such extreme sensitiveness of the vagina that it is impossible for the physician to make an examination with the index finger. It is not an inflammation but a hyperesthesia.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Pain in the ovarian region, especially the left. Burning, stitching pains in the ovaries.
rubric_passages.Head: Sensation of numbness of the scalp with, pressing pain in the head, boring, compression of the head. Tension of the scalp, cramplike constrictions of the scalp gradually increasing to violence, cramplike pains gradually increasing to violence.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: She is in a contemptuous mood, anxious and serious over matters that are not serious, irritable about trifling things, is moody and sulky over slight vexations, anxious, weeping.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Burning in the rectum during stool. Itching, tickling, and tenesmus of the anus, especially in the evening.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Inveterate constipation, much flatus. Frequent urging to stool and inability to strain at stool, inveterate constipation and unsuccessful urging to stool. Constipation in travelers. Prolonged efforts to pass a stool.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Aching pains, burning pains and protrusion of hemorrhoids during stool. Burning in the rectum during stool.
rubric_passages.Skin: Coldness, crawling, and numbness of the skin, especially during fever.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Much flatulence, fermentation in the stomach. Jerking of the muscles of the stomach and abdomen.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Much flatulence, fermentation in the stomach.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Violent, cramping pains in the abdomen, drawing pains in the navel as if by a string, which causes a sensation of retraction of the abdomen. Pressing, bearing down pains in the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Shifting, neuralgic pains. Painful tremulousness all over the body, with throbbing in the blood vessels.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: Pulsating and digging through the lower jaw, especially the right side, together with numbness and coldness.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: The patient is prostrated. Paralytic weakness, which is worse during rest.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain, sore: Such extreme sensitiveness of the external genitals that it is impossible for the woman to wear a napkin during menstruation. Such extreme sensitiveness of the vagina that it is impossible for the physician to make an examination with the index finger.
rubric_passages.Appetite: Loss of appetite on account of the depressed mood or at other times a ravenous appetite; hasty eating, eats everything around her.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has cured sterility of long standing, especially sterility that is supposed to come from excessive sexual excitement. It has cured ovarian tumors and cystic tumors. It has cured epilepsy arising from onanism.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, uterus: Inflammation of the uterus, bearing down, as in prolapsus. Prolapsed uterus and dragging in the pelvis. Polypus of the uterus and uterine hemorrhages.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Sensation as if the whole abdomen were tightly constricted or bandaged. Tension of the skin of the abdomen.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Palpitation, trembling in all limbs during every little excitement. After every mental exertion palpitation, trembling, numbness, quivering, and excitement in the limbs.
rubric_passages.Ear: Cramping pain in the ears, coldness in the ears, numbness of the external ears. The numbness of the ears extends to the face, nose and scalp.
rubric_passages.Face: Sensation of coldness of the face, numbness of the face, cramping, pressing pains in the face. Neuralgia of the face. Tearing boring pain in the face.

profile.personality: Slow, sluggish, and insidious in nature, with a marked tendency toward deception and feigning illness. The Plumbum personality is intensely emotional despite intellectual dullness, continually changing from one group of imaginations and emotions to another.
profile.mental_state: Perception, comprehension, and memory are profoundly impaired; the mind operates with great slowness yet is paradoxically restless, making constant effort to think which prevents sleep. Progressive mental deterioration moves from insomnia through melancholia to periods of coma, with inability to recall words or express oneself adequately.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep melancholy with timidity and restlessness predominates, accompanied by a persistent feeling that something terrible will happen and conviction of having committed an unpardonable sin. The emotional life is changeable and intense, swinging between groups of imaginations and emotions, with a marked hysterical diathesis including inclination to exaggerate one's ills.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard: At times the abdomen does become concave, as if the abdomen and back were too close together.
rubric_passages.Back: With the chronic affection of the head there is contraction of the muscles of the back and neck; drawing and twitching indicating meningeal troubles; spasmodic jerking.
rubric_passages.Bladder: The bladder is also paretic; cannot expel the urine, the muscles do not cooperate to void the urine and there is retention. Plumbum has both retention and suppression of urine.
rubric_passages.Chill: While walking in the open air the patient becomes hot in the head, pale in the face, and cold in the extremities, hands and feet cold as ice, as if dead; and if he continues the exertion the face becomes fairly cadaveric.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Extremities cold, blue, numb and emaciated. Sweat on the extremities, and on the feet it is stinking. Feet and toes withered like a washerwoman's hands. Toes blistered; blisters between the toes, smarting. Ulcerations. Molecular death and even gangrene of the skin of the fingers and toes. Calluses about the feet, corns and bunions.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: There is, paralysis of both extensors and flexors, but especially extensors. The paralysis begins in the extensors, so that we have wrist drop. He cannot raise or lift anything with the hand. Extension is difficult.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis, painless: The activities of the body, the functions of the organs, are slowed down in pace. The nerves do not convey their messages with the usual activity. The muscles are slow in action, sluggish. There is first paresis and finally paralysis, of parts first and finally of the whole.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The remedy is slow and insidious; it works continuously; it does not leave the economy but holds on and establishes a miasm of its own. It, therefore, suits slow and insidious chronic cases, with no tendency to recovery. Progressive muscular atrophy; progressive paralysis. Chronic constipation; chronic retention of urine; chronic giving way of the mind.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: She would bear much pricking and you could scarcely tell she was breathing.
Paroxysmal pain in the limbs, evening and night; better by pressure and worse from motion.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: The body and mind are weak.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Vaginismus in keeping with the spasmodic action.
rubric_passages.Mind: Aside from the slowness of the mind, which is a general, the remedy is full of melancholia, sadness, feeling as if something terrible would happen; that she has sinned away the day of grace; that she has committed the unpardonable sin.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Deep melancholy with timidity and restlessness.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Distinct blue line along the margins of the gums. Gums pale, swollen, show a lead-colored line; blue, purple, or brown; painful with hard tubercles. Tongue dry, brown, cracked; coated yellow or green; dry, red, glazed in chronic gastritis. Breath foetid, dryness of mouth, ulceration, aphthae.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Constriction of intestines; navel and anus violently retracted.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Constipated stools, hard, lumpy like sheeps dung; with urging and terrible pain from constriction or spasms of anus; knotty faeces in form of balls.
rubric_passages.Skin: Anemia, chlorosis, emaciation, muscular atrophy, wandering pains, dropsical swellings, yellow skin, jaundice.
rubric_passages.Sleep: His thoughts trouble him all night and prevent sleep. Insomnia; sleepless from the continual effort to think.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The stomach has no ability to digest food. Assimilation is also destroyed. Violent vomiting of everything eaten. Chronic gastric catarrh with vomiting of albuminous mucus and sweetish substance. Vomiting of stercoraceous matter, blackish blood and green fluid. Sour eructations.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Everything eaten turns sour. Violent vomiting of everything eaten.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Pains in the abdomen, tearing, like colic, doubling the patient up. Constant sensation of pulling at the navel as by a string; as if the abdomen were drawn in. Excessive pain in abdomen radiating from thence to all parts of the body. Severe colic; contracted abdomen; bends backward, motor nerves most affected.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: Retention of urine from lack of sensation that the bladder is full.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness: She would bear much pricking and you could scarcely tell she was breathing.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Paroxysmal pain in the limbs, evening and night; better by pressure and worse from motion. Lightning-like pains. Jerking and trembling of all the limbs.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: Apoplexy. Stupor, when Opium is sufficiently similar to remove the cerebral congestion which always surrounds the apoplectic clot, Plumbum may follow. Plumbum, Phosphorus and Alumina are three sheet anchors. The paralysis of muscles, the paralytic weakness of one side of the body, or single parts of the body, show its relation to such cases.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pressure: Paroxysmal pain in the limbs, evening and night; better by pressure and worse from motion.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: The trophic functions are slow in that they do not keep up with the waste, and so we see emaciation until the patient becomes almost a skeleton. The skin is wrinkled, puckered, shriveled, and drawn over the bones.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness: Deep melancholy with timidity and restlessness.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Plumbum cures kidney affections with albumen and sugar in the urine. The urine is dark, scanty, and of high specific gravity.

profile.personality: A sluggish, torpid constitution prone to periodic crises — alternating between states of overwhelming physical discharge and mental stagnation. The Podophyllum type is restless and fidgety, unable to sit still, yet deeply fatigued in mind and body.
profile.mental_state: The mind is easily fatigued with a torpid, fluctuating quality mirroring the disordered liver. There is a tendency toward fixed delusions — believing one has organic disease of the heart or liver, that the illness will become chronic, or that one has sinned beyond redemption. Mental excitement or overexertion readily triggers physical crises.
profile.emotional_pattern: Dominated by deep depression, melancholia, and profound dejection — everything appears dark with no light visible. There is a pervasive sense of impending doom, a feeling that things will only worsen. An overwhelming 'all-gone' emptiness pervades both body and spirit, as if everything internal is dragging downward and falling away.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness, sensation of: An awful, hungry, empty weakness, as if the whole intestines would drop out.
rubric_passages.Back: Soreness about the liver; pain through to the back; dull aching pain, finally jaundice; becomes extremely yellow.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Soreness about the liver; pain through to the back; dull aching pain, finally jaundice.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Much pain in the ovaries, in one or both, extending down the crural region, down the front of the thigh.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Prostration is so marked that if not relieved in a day or two, it seems he must die.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: With this tumultuous action, she has an indescribable sensation; an all-gone feeling, a deathly sick feeling, described by some as an emptiness, as if fasting, yet averse to food.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The uterine ligaments become relaxed and there is prolapsus. ... Dragging down in the region of the ovary and the ovary is congested. The uterus is extremely sore and is enlarged; sore to touch so that light clothing aggravates.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Much pain in the ovaries, in one or both, extending down the crural region, down the front of the thigh. Pain in the ovaries, especially the right; pain in the ovaries during the menstrual period, gripping pain in the bowels during the menstrual period.
rubric_passages.Rectum: The rectum protrudes for inches. ... With the stool there is very commonly a prolapse of the rectum; a gush of watery stool and a prolapse of the rectum; a soft stool with great straining and a prolapse of the rectum.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Alternating diarrhea and constipation; ... constipation lasting for weeks, no stool except in lumps; difficult, scanty stool and as soon as he disorders his stomach again comes a diarrhea.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: This soreness, cramping, and rumbling precedes the stool, but sometimes it continues during the stool. Commonly the patient is relieved by the stool.
rubric_passages.Sleep: It lies in bed and rolls the head in sleep.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Everything taken into the stomach becomes sour. The glands of the stomach are as if paralyzed; there is no digestion; this goes on until we have vomiting and diarrhea.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Everything taken into the stomach becomes sour.
rubric_passages.Stomach, pain: Uneasiness and distress about two or three hours after eating, with jaundice; horrible nausea; aversion to food; empty all-gone feeling in the bowels.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: This is attended with severe cramping pains doubling her up. Abdomen is sensitive; so sore she cannot endure pressure.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness: An all-gone feeling, a deathly sick feeling, described by some as an emptiness, as if fasting, yet averse to food. An awful, hungry, empty weakness.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: This is attended with severe cramping pains doubling her up.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: Weakness attended with soreness. ... deathly, overpowering nausea and prostration.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Gallstone colic; enlargement of the liver; gastric weakness; unable to digest; duodenal catarrh; catarrh of intestines with copious diarrhea.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, liver: It seems to begin with the liver, as if all the parts were let down. ... Soreness about the liver; pain through to the back; dull aching pain, finally jaundice; becomes extremely yellow. Liver sensitive to touch. ... he strokes the region of the liver from behind forward and in this way gets relief, yet the liver is so sore that he can hardly bear the pressure.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, uterus: The uterine ligaments become relaxed and there is prolapsus. ... The uterus is extremely sore and is enlarged; sore to touch so that light clothing aggravates. ... Indicated if there is a copious diarrhea during the menstrual period, and great soreness in the uterus.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: It affects profoundly the abdominal viscera. It shows its symptoms largely on the abdominal organs, the pelvic organs, and the liver. The abdomen seems to be the earliest seat of attack. ... rumbling; gurgling as if animals were floundering about; clinically, as if fish were turning and tossing in a pond.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, weakness: An awful, hungry, empty weakness, as if the whole intestines would drop out. ... The sensation of dragging down as if all the parts would be pushed out into the world is a common feature.
rubric_passages.Generalities, morning: The cholera morbus coming on in the latter part of the night, especially about 3, 4, or 5 o'clock, resembles Podophyllum.
rubric_passages.Stool: If you notice the Podophyllum discharge in the commode, you will see a great amount of water, on the bottom a sediment like cornmeal gruel; as if cornmeal had been stirred in. If you see it early it is yellow, muddy, or yellow-green, profuse, offensive, cadaverous; the odor penetrates the whole house; stool gushes away like water from a bung-hole; gurgling and much flatus.

profile.personality: A deeply debilitated, withdrawn individual who dreads the open air and wants only to retreat home and lie down. They are averse to being disturbed or washed, preferring warm seclusion and solitude over any form of engagement with the outside world.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by fixed ideas of ruin and hopelessness — convinced that business will fail, that they are destined for the poorhouse, that they have sinned beyond redemption. There is a dazed, befogged quality to cognition, with slow mental function, difficulty answering questions, and a stuporous bewilderment that mirrors the general paretic weakness of the body.
profile.emotional_pattern: Overwhelming sadness and despair pervade the emotional life, with no capacity for joy even when circumstances are objectively favorable. They are extremely irritable, want to be left alone, and may be driven to suicidal anxiety — particularly tormented at night by relentless itching that allows no relief whether covered or uncovered.

rubric_passages.Bladder: the bladder is full of urine, yet it passes slowly and he feels that some remains; he can never finish stool or urination; he has to go back several times.
rubric_passages.Chest: wants to rest the chest and breathing apparatus by lying down. Asthmatic dyspnoea ameliorated by lying down, and worse the nearer the arms are brought to the body.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation from the least exertion, better lying. Stitching pain better lying. Cardiac murmurs of either side. Mitral regurgitant murmur. Pericarditis of rheumatic origin. Heart symptoms with general weakness, dusky face, dazed look.
rubric_passages.Chill: The chill is not marked, but the heat is intense and the sweat copious. He is almost in a stupor, befogged, bewildered, cannot answer questions; face red, puffed, mottled.
rubric_passages.Extremities: The skin of the hands is rough, chaps easily, becomes thick and scaly, easily cracks; breaks out in little scaly, eruptions; looks unwashed; he always appears to have dirty hands.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Psorinum is slowed down in all of its functions; a state of paretic weakness. He does not rally after a fever; his digestion is slow; the stool is normal, yet it requires a great effort to expel it.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: The Psorinum patient himself is one of debility. He wants to go home after a short walk. He is worse in the open air. He cannot breathe in the open air; cannot breathe while he is standing up; wants to go home and lie down so that he can breathe.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: All sorts of menstrual disorders, especially a prolonged menstruation. When a woman has passed through an abortion and the placenta has come away, but every few days a little gush of fresh, bright red blood and clots, or going days and weeks with a little oozing of bright red blood; every time she gets on her feet there is a new start of the flow; no tendency to permanent recovery.
rubric_passages.Head: Old chronic periodical headaches with hunger, and often the hunger lasts during the whole headache; must get up at night for have something to eat. The headache is sometimes improve by eating. If he goes without a meal he has a headache. Violent rush of blood to the head, hot face, hair wet with the perspiration, hunger.
rubric_passages.Mind: Sadness, hopeless; he sees no light breaking through the clouds above his head; all is dark about him. He thinks his business is going to be a failure; that he is going to the poor house; that he has sinned away his day of grace. It is a fixed idea during the day and he dreams about it at night. Overwhelming sadness; dejection; he takes no joy in his family; feels that these things are hot for him.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Rigg's disease; the teeth become loose; the gums settle away, spongy, bleed easily, humid, blue, the teeth fall out. Ulcers about the tongue and mouth; ulcers as found in infancy; aphthae, thrush; ulcerated sore mouth, sore throat, chronic ulcers of throat.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Haemorrhage from the rectum. Chronic diarrhea, early morning, urgent. Hot flatus, burning the anus; smells of spoiled eggs.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Obstinate constipation. Soft stool, passed with difficult do not forget this. Although the stool is soft and perfectly normal it cannot be expelled at one sitting.
rubric_passages.Respiration: He cannot breathe in the open air; cannot breathe while he is standing up; wants to go home and lie down so that he can breathe.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Asthma: or cardiac dyspnoea, when the patient wants to go home and lie down so that he can breathe. Usually this condition is relieved by sitting up and from the open air. Not so with Psorinum, he wants a warm place and to he down and to be let alone.
rubric_passages.Skin: The patient dreads to be washed. The skin over the body, especially of the face, looks filthy, though it has been well washed. A dingy, dirty, foul look, as if covered with dirt. Skin rough and uneven, cracks easily, bleeding fissures; it becomes rough and scaly. He cannot wash it clean.
rubric_passages.Sleep: must get up at night for have something to eat. It is a fixed idea during the day and he dreams about it at night.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Chronic vomiting; ulcer of the stomach, distension of stomach are commonly associated. Always sour belching, sour stomach. Vomiting of blood and bloody stools.
rubric_passages.Appetite, increased (hunger in general): Old chronic periodical headaches with hunger, and often the hunger lasts during the whole headache; must get up at night for have something to eat.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: eructations taste as if be had eaten bard boiled eggs and they had spoiled, and they smell so to others; stool flatus, and eructations smell like spoiled eggs.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: the bladder is full of urine, yet it passes slowly and he feels that some remains; he can never finish stool or urination; he has to go back several times.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: He is weak and exhausted, crawls up stairs on the hands and knees. Sweat profuse, cold, clammy from least exertion.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: Violent rush of blood to the head, hot face, hair wet with the perspiration, hunger.
rubric_passages.Appetite: The fever has subsided, but the patient has no appetite; he does not convalesce; he wants to lie down and does no desire to, be moved.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous: ravenous appetite yet grows thin. Foetid odors would lead one to think of Psorinum.
rubric_passages.Clinical: A psoric patient comes down with typhoid; the typhoid has been arrested or has run its course and it is time for convalescence. The fever has subsided, but the patient has no appetite; he does not convalesce; one dose of Psorinum will cause a reaction, stop his sweat, increase his appetite, cause better breathing.

profile.personality: A mild, gentle, yielding disposition that is easily led and easily persuaded, yet remarkably touchy and sensitive to every social influence. The Pulsatilla type is changeable, fidgety, and full of whims and imaginations, with a strong tendency toward religious notions and fixed ideas.
profile.mental_state: Extremely excitable and imaginative, prone to religious fanaticism, fixed ideas about Scripture, and irrational aversions to things well-established as normal (marriage, certain foods, social contact). In advanced states, the patient becomes taciturn and withdrawn, sitting silently day after day, answering only with nods or monosyllables.
profile.emotional_pattern: Fundamentally tearful, sad, and despondent, with weeping that comes without cause and a deep melancholy that can progress to religious despair. The patient always feels slighted or fears being slighted, yet is ameliorated by walking in cool open air and worsened in the evening, with emotional symptoms closely intertwined with menstrual and uterine disorders.

rubric_passages.Abdomen, hard: It brings about especially a tumid fullness of the abdomen, such a stuffed feeling that she cannot breathe.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, rumbling: Many troubles seem to manifest themselves in the abdomen by bloating, distension of the abdomen, flatulence, colicky pains, rumbling, fermentation of food, and from disorders of menstruation or diarrhea.
rubric_passages.Back: In curvature of the spine Puls. is of great value. Pain in the back, lumbar and sacral regions; wandering pains; spinal irritation after sexual excesses. Rheumatic pains in the spine and limbs, worse during rest and better from slow motion.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness: Pain in small of back as if sprained; sensation of cold water poured down back.
rubric_passages.Back, coldness, extending, down back: sensation of cold water poured down back.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in the back, lumbar and sacral regions; wandering pains; spinal irritation after sexual excesses. Rheumatic pains in the spine and limbs, worse during rest and better from slow motion. Pain in small of back as if sprained.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region: great soreness in the back relieved by lying on something hard.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Pulsatilla establishes a chronic, inveterate catarrh of the bladder. Copious mucous discharge, bloody discharge, especially after taking cold. Thick, ropy, purulent, green, offensive discharge.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: frequent, scanty, with urging; wonderful tenesmus; extremely painful, bloody, burning, smarting urine; there is scarcely a drop collects in the bladder but it must be expelled.
rubric_passages.Chest: Dry, teasing cough and dyspnoea; wants the windows open, aggravated lying down. Cough gagging and choking. Copious expectoration in the morning, of thick yellow-green mucus. Dry, teasing cough at night, worse lying down. Sensation of fullness in the chest in the evening with pulsation preventing sleep.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Palpitation from lying on the left side. Cannot sleep on the left side as it increases the palpitation and suffocation.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, palpitation, eating: Dyspnoea; oppression from walking fast or becoming overheated after eating.
rubric_passages.Chill: Pulsatilla cures intermittent fever, coming on from; disordered stomach. Chill morning and evening daily. The chill begins in the bands and feet; pains in the limbs during the chill; one sided coldness with numb feeling; fever one sided.
rubric_passages.Extremities: All the limbs are painful; drawing, tearing pains in the limbs, better from motion and after motion; worse from a warm room and better from cold applications. Marked restlessness and twitching of the limbs and feet; numbness of the limb, lain on; wandering pains in all the limbs.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness: The chill begins in the bands and feet; pains in the limbs during the chill; one sided coldness with numb feeling.
rubric_passages.Extremities, coldness, hands: The chill begins in the bands and feet.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The patient is commonly relieved from slow motion in the open air, becomes frantic when trying to keep still, worse during rest, ameliorated by doing something, generally slow, moderate motion. This relief from motion and aggravation from rest, relief in the open air, and aggravation in a warm room give us a good summary of this beautiful remedy.
rubric_passages.Generalities, faintness, fainting: Nervous manifestations, twitchings, spell of blindness and fainting.
The Pulsatilla headache is a throbbing congestive headache; much, heat in the head, ameliorated by the application of cold, by external pressure.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Exaggerated sexual desire; nymphomania; wild, beside herself with sexual thoughts; uncontrollable sexual desire. Inflammation of ovaries and uterus. Suppression of menses from getting feet wet. Menses too late, scanty.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Violent menstrual colic, causing her to bend double; soreness in the region of the uterus and ovaries; distended abdomen; throws the covers off; wants the windows open; tearful; weeps without a cause.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain, sore, uterus: Violent menstrual colic, causing her to bend double; soreness in the region of the uterus and ovaries.
rubric_passages.Head: Pulsatilla has violent headaches. Headaches in school girls who are about to menstruate. Headache accompanying menstruation. Headache associated with suppressed menses, with menstrual disorders; not caused from them, but associated with them. Pains through the temples and sides of the head are common Pulsatilla headaches.
rubric_passages.Mind: She is tearful, plethoric, and generally has little credit for being sick from her appearances; yet she is most nervous, fidgety, changeable, easily led and easily persuaded. While she is mild, gentle and tearful, yet she is remarkably irritable, not in the sense of pugnacity, but easily irritated, extremely touchy, always feels slighted or fears she will be slighted; sensible to every social influence.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: While she is mild, gentle and tearful, yet she is remarkably irritable, not in the sense of pugnacity, but easily irritated, extremely touchy, always feels slighted or fears she will be slighted; sensible to every social influence.
rubric_passages.Mind, quiet, quiet disposition: She is tearful, plethoric, and generally has little credit for being sick from her appearances; yet she is most nervous, fidgety, changeable, easily led and easily persuaded. While she is mild, gentle and tearful.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: There is much restlessness in Pulsatilla. She becomes so nervous in a room while at rest that the pains seem intensified and she must move about.

profile.personality: A restless, driven individual who cannot remain still and feels compelled to keep moving. They are loquacious and mentally accelerated, thinking and talking faster than usual, with a nervous energy that makes sitting intolerable.
profile.mental_state: Marked confusion about bodily boundaries and personal identity — they may feel dispersed, as if covering the whole bed, or sense they become a different person when changing position. Delirium and mental fog alternate with periods of rapid, pressured thinking and heightened verbal fluency.
profile.emotional_pattern: Underlying irritability dominates, with deep anxiety and a sinking dread centered around the heart. They are prone to frightful dreams and persistent, intrusive thoughts that prevent sleep, reflecting a pervasive sense of internal decay and restless unease.

rubric_passages.Chill: Violent chill intermingled with heat and sweat, or dry heat with marked aching in the limbs; restlessness, > by motion and heat.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Cold extremities. Numbness of extremities. Hands and arms numb. Hands cold and clammy.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The sore bruised condition is as marked as in Arnica and Baptisia; the aching in the bones like Eupatorium, the restlessness, > by motion and heat like Rhus. Pains all aggravated sitting. Complaints come on from becoming cold, and from cold damp weather.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: Uterine haemorrhage. Putrid, scanty lochia. Suppressed lochia. Violent chill; puerperal fever. Menses lasting one day, then bloody leucorrhea. Septic fever following abortion. Prolapsus of uterus.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Vomiting of bile, blood; of putrid masses. Vomits water when it becomes warm in the stomach. Stercoraceous vomiting. Coffee ground vomiting.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst: Thirst for cold drinks during chill and heat.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Aching in bones all over the body. Soreness of the muscles and the bed feels hard, > by motion. Pain in all the limbs with great restlessness.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It aborts puerperal fever in a few hours when clearly indicated. She has not been well since a puerperal fever many years ago, is a good reason for thinking of Pyrogen. It has cured Bright's disease that could be traced to septic origin.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Distension and great sensitiveness of abdomen. Rumbling in bowels. Pain on deep breathing.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: It is a most useful remedy when there is threatening heart failure in septic and zymotic fevers. Heart failure in septic fevers, < by least motion. Every pulsation felt in distant parts. Anxiety and sinking sensation in region of heart. Distinct consciousness of the heart.
rubric_passages.Generalities, heat: These features are found in hectic fevers in the last stages of phthisis, as well as septic fevers. When the temperature reaches 106 and there is great soreness and aching this remedy will make great changes in a single day.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: Pain in all the limbs with great restlessness. Aching in bones all over the body. Soreness of the muscles and the bed feels hard, > by motion.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, lower limbs: Pain in the knees and legs during chill and fever, ameliorated from walking, and from heat. Aching in legs while sitting, > by walking.
rubric_passages.Clinical, colic: Cutting, colicky pain. Pain in right side going through to the back < on every motion, talking and breathing; > by lying on right side; groaning with every breath.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, inflammation: Inflammation of peritoneum, intestines and uterus, of septic origin.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, leg: Pain in the knees and legs during chill and fever, ameliorated from walking, and from heat. Aching in legs while sitting, > by walking. Aching above knee as if bone were broken, > by stretching of limbs and motion.
rubric_passages.Fever: The potencies prepared from Heath's 3d of decomposed beef have been used by the author for many years against all forms of septic fever and sequelae, when the symptoms agree. Violent chill intermingled with heat and sweat, or dry heat with marked aching in the limbs; restlessness, > by motion and heat.
rubric_passages.Fever, septic fever: It will often save life in the most dangerous and rapid septic fevers. Fevers from sewer gas poisoning; erysipelas from infection and surgical fevers.
rubric_passages.Stomach, thirst, extreme: Thirst for cold drinks during chill and heat.
rubric_passages.Clinical, inflammation: Inflammation of peritoneum, intestines and uterus, of septic origin. Great pain when the flow from an open abscess becomes scanty. Violent burning in an abscess (Ars., Anthr., Tarent. cubensis).
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation, pulse: When the pulse is extremely high, and the temperature not correspondingly high this remedy will be useful. On the other hand, when the pulse and temperature are out of rhythm either way this remedy should be considered if the case is of septic origin. Rapid irregular fluttering pulse.
rubric_passages.Chill, evening: The chill is quotidian; it comes in the evening, generally at 7 P.M. The periodicity is regular.
rubric_passages.Chill, shaking, evening: Violent chill; puerperal fever. The chill is quotidian; it comes in the evening, generally at 7 P.M.
rubric_passages.Chill, shaking, shivering, rigors: Violent chill intermingled with heat and sweat. Violent chill; puerperal fever.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, aching: Aching in legs while sitting, > by walking. Aching above knee as if bone were broken, > by stretching of limbs and motion.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain, thigh: Pain in the thighs during chill and fever.
rubric_passages.Fever, external heat: Hot sweat with high temperature. Cheeks red and burning hot.
rubric_passages.Fever, external heat, chilliness, with: Violent chill intermingled with heat and sweat, or dry heat with marked aching in the limbs.
rubric_passages.Fever, intense heat: When the temperature reaches 106 and there is great soreness and aching this remedy will make great changes in a single day; but if the pains are > by motion and heat it will abort the fever.

profile.personality: A highly sensitive, irritable individual who is easily excitable and prone to quarrelsomeness. They resemble the broken-down state of chronic invalids—weak, tottering, and deeply reactive to environmental changes. There is a marked susceptibility to fright and vexation, with a constitution that has been worn down by prolonged suffering or excess.
profile.mental_state: Confusion of mind predominates, with vertigo triggered by cold air and a peculiar sensation of enlargement of the head. The mental faculties are dulled and besotted, particularly in cases of prolonged alcohol use, with a tendency toward epileptiform episodes and sudden fainting weakness.
profile.emotional_pattern: Deep depression of spirits with an active desire to die characterizes the core emotional state. There is a pronounced fear of ghosts and an underlying irritability that easily escalates into quarrelsomeness. The emotional pattern reflects a person who is both frightened and combative—reacting to their suffering with alternating despair and agitation.

rubric_passages.Back: Sore spots in the spine. Pain along the inner margin of the left scapula. Stitching pains in the spine between the scapulae. Pains in lower and inner margin of scapula in shoemakers, needle workers and writers from sitting bent. One scapula often becomes adhered to the back and it is immovable, and later burning pain comes on. Weak spine and great lassitude. Vesicular eruptions form upon the back and chest with blue contents, with severe pain.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Sore spots in the spine. Pain along the inner margin of the left scapula. Stitching pains in the spine between the scapulae. Pains in lower and inner margin of scapula in shoemakers, needle workers and writers from sitting bent.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region: Stitching pains in the spine between the scapulae. Pains in lower and inner margin of scapula in shoemakers, needle workers and writers from sitting bent. One scapula often becomes adhered to the back and it is immovable, and later burning pain comes on.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, dorsal region, scapulae: Pain along the inner margin of the left scapula. Stitching pains in the spine between the scapulae. One scapula often becomes adhered to the back and it is immovable, and later burning pain comes on.
rubric_passages.Chest: Heavy, short breathing with oppression of chest in the evening. Sighing breathing. Pressure and constriction of the chest. Pressing pains in the walls of the chest. Violent stitching pains in the chest walls. Stitching pains in the region of fifth and sixth ribs. Painful soreness on touch or pressure on the floating ribs. Rheumatic pains in the chest. Chronic costal rheumatism. Soreness describing the attachments of the diaphragm. Inflammation of the diaphragm and pleura. Hydrothorax pains in chest from adhesions of the pleura. Sensitive as if inner parts were adhered. Pain worse from motion, in cold air, from becoming cold, on inspiration. Sensation of a cold wet cloth on going into cold air. Stitching pains every change of the weather from warm to cold. Sore spots here and there on the ribs.
rubric_passages.Chill: Its complaints are worse in the evening and after any change in the weather, especially from warm to cold. The evening aggravations are quite marked; the headache, ear pain, the nasal symptoms, the fever, soreness in the short ribs, dyspnoea, oppression of chest and heart, tightness of chest, increased pulsation, trembling, chilliness, are all worse in the evening. He is extremely sensitive to cold and cold, open air.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Rheumatic pains, paroxysmal in character in the upper limbs. Stitching pains along the nerves in arms and hands. Tearing pains in forearm and hand. The pains are worse from cold, and worse from Motion. Bluish vesicles in the palms and fingers. Seed warts on the, thumb. Great weakness in lower limbs in forenoon. Stitching burning from the spine along the sciatic nerve in cold, wet weather and in stormy weather, worse from motion and in cold air. Drawing pain in the thighs. Rheumatic pain in knees, stinging and soreness in foot and toes. Corns very painful, sore to touch, sting and burn. He suffers from complaints like chilblains.
rubric_passages.Generalities: This buttercup gives off an acrid ethereal vapor very poisonous to such as are sensitive to it, and has been many times mistaken for Rhus poisoning. It is a rheumatic remedy of great usefulness when the chest muscles are involved. Pain in the spinal nerves, pleura and costal muscles always with extreme soreness. It is as sensitive to motion as Bryonia, and to the cold, damp weather as Dulcamara.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: It has sudden weakness even to fainting, and it has cured epilepsy.
rubric_passages.Head: Cerebral hyperemia with heat of the face. Headache with change of temperature, pressing headache in forehead and vertex worse when changing temperature, either to cold or warm room. Violent pains over right eye, worse lying, and better when walking and standing. All other pains worse from motion. This is a notable exception.
rubric_passages.Mind: It has great depression of spirits and desire to die. Fear of ghosts and very irritable, even quarrelsome. Confusion of mind.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Fear of ghosts and very irritable, even quarrelsome.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Heavy, short breathing with oppression of chest in the evening. Sighing breathing. Pressure and constriction of the chest.
rubric_passages.Skin: Dark blue vesicles upon the skin. Horny scurf forms after the vesicles have opened. It has been used for vesicular eruptions; for burns; for herpes zoster; for pemphigus; for eczema. Flat burning, stinging, ulcers. Horn-like excrescences.
rubric_passages.Sleep: He is late falling asleep. Sleepless from difficult breathing, from heat, and orgasms of blood.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Burning in the stomach and especially in the region of the cardiac orifice. Stomach is very sensitive to touch. Paroxysms of neuralgia of the stomach.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: In the abdomen there is much flatulence, colic, burning and great soreness on pressure. Stitching pain in right side of abdomen under the ribs. The pains are much worse from motion, breathing and walking. Many stitching pains in abdomen.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Pain in the spinal nerves, pleura and costal muscles always with extreme soreness. It is as sensitive to motion as Bryonia, and to the cold, damp weather as Dulcamara. He is sore and bruised in many parts. Stitching pains in liver, ears, chest, abdomen, shoulder and other joints, spine, lumbar region to abdomen, between the shoulders in the back, stitching, burning pains radiating from the dorsal spine.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: It has sudden weakness even to fainting, and it has cured epilepsy. Weak spine and great lassitude.
rubric_passages.Clinical: It has cured lupus and epithelioma. It has cured hay fever with burning in eyes and itching of the soft palate. It hag cured many times the weak and tottering condition of patients suffering from prolonged use, of stimulants, such as whisky and brandy. It is a great remedy for weak and tottering condition of patients suffering from prolonged use delirium tremens when he is besotted, has hiccoughs and is more or less convulsive. Epileptiform convulsions from alcoholic liquors. It has cured hemiopia during pregnancy.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, liver: Sore bruised feeling in the short ribs, stitching pains in the liver, jaundiced. Soreness in liver on deep pressure; symptoms worse in the evening.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region, back, left, right: Pain along the inner margin of the left scapula. Stitching pains in the spine between the scapulae.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: In the abdomen there is much flatulence, colic, burning and great soreness on pressure. Stitching pain in right side of abdomen under the ribs. The pains are much worse from motion, breathing and walking. Many stitching pains in abdomen. It has a watery diarrhoea and dysentery. It has herpes zoster with violent pains.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region, back: Stitching pains in the spine between the scapulae. Pains in lower and inner margin of scapula in shoemakers, needle workers and writers from sitting bent. One scapula often becomes adhered to the back and it is immovable, and later burning pain comes on.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Pain in the region of heart from motion and inspiration and lying on left side. Rheumatic swelling of pectoral muscles with extreme soreness to touch. Pleurodynia with most violent cutting pains from inspiration, pressure, turning the body and cold air. Pulse full, hard and rapid in the evening and slow in the morning.
rubric_passages.Back, dorsal region: Stitching pains in the spine between the scapulae. Pains in lower and inner margin of scapula in shoemakers, needle workers and writers from sitting bent. Painful soreness on touch or pressure on the floating ribs. Rheumatic pains in the chest. Hydrothorax pains in chest from adhesions of the pleura. Pain worse from motion, in cold air, from becoming cold, on inspiration.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, pressing, load, as f: Pressing pain in forehead; vertex; eyes; temples; root of nose; pit of stomach; shoulder; across the lower part of chest; middle of chest.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Headache with change of temperature, pressing headache in forehead and vertex worse when changing temperature, either to cold or warm room. Violent pains over right eye, worse lying, and better when walking and standing.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, pressing: Pressing pain in forehead; vertex; eyes; temples; root of nose; pit of stomach; shoulder; across the lower part of chest; middle of chest. Pressure and constriction of the chest. Pressing pains in the walls of the chest.

profile.personality: A restless, weather-sensitive individual who cannot tolerate stillness and must keep moving to find relief. They are forgetful and easily scattered, losing track of conversations mid-sentence and omitting words in writing. They have an aversion to their own business and are unusually susceptible to the effects of wine.
profile.mental_state: The mind is marked by pronounced forgetfulness and cognitive lapses—forgetting what one is saying while speaking, and leaving out words when writing. There is a dread of approaching storms, particularly thunder, revealing a nervous temperament acutely attuned to atmospheric changes. Mental faculties decline during rest and cold, damp conditions.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional state is one of anxious restlessness driven by a deep sensitivity to environmental forces, especially storms and cold. There is a pervasive fearfulness tied to weather changes, producing a nervous dread that precedes thunderstorms. An underlying weariness and aversion to responsibilities suggests a person worn down by chronic suffering who withdraws from engagement with daily obligations.

rubric_passages.Back: Rheumatic pains stiffness in neck and back.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Pain in dorsal region extending to arms in cold, wet weather, aggravated during rest, Tearing pains in neck and back driving out of bed.
rubric_passages.Chest: Rheumatic stitching pains in chest in stormy weather during rest. Constriction of chest.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Rheumatic tearing pains in all the limbs in stormy weather, aggravated before a storm and during rest, aggravated at night; mostly in forearms and legs.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Extremely sensitive to cold weather, and aggravated from becoming cold. Paralytic Weakness during rest, yet be is weak from exertion. Continued motion is his only relief. Painfully sensitive to windy cold weather.

rubric_passages.Mind: Fear of thunder in nervous persons (Phos.), forgetful. While talking he forgets what he was talking about. Leaves out words in writing. Aversion to his business. Easily affected by wine.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Much straining to pass a soft stool. Undigested, thin, brownish stool. Diarrhea after eating, after fruit; from cold, wet weather, before a thunderstorm. Dysentery before a thunderstorm. Pulsating anus, drawing in anus extending to genitals.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: There are tearing, shooting pains. Sore bruised pains. Stiffness of joints, neck and back.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Pain as from flatulence high up in sides of abdomen. Stitching in spleen from walking fast. Rumbling in abdomen and fullness after eating.
