profile.personality: The Rhus Toxicodendron constitutional type is fundamentally restless and driven, unable to remain still yet quickly exhausted by sustained effort. They are industrious people who must keep moving to feel comfortable, but their energy is limited and they cycle between activity and collapse. There is a deep physical and mental rigidity that loosens with warming up, mirroring their stiff, guarded approach to life.
profile.mental_state: Mentally, the Rhus type suffers from prostration and inability to sustain mental effort, with a mind that seizes up like their joints and only functions after warming into a task. There is incoherent thinking under stress, anxiety with apprehension especially at night, and a pervasive sense of impending misfortune. Despondency and disgust for life dominate the chronic state, with suicidal ideation yet lacking the courage to act on it.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of profound sadness and weeping without known cause, coupled with intense irritability and a feeling that some misfortune has occurred. They experience extreme anxiety and nervous restlessness in both acute and chronic states, with fears that intensify markedly at night. There is an ambivalence at their center — they desire death yet fear it, want relief yet cannot rest — reflecting an emotional life trapped between despair and agitation.

rubric_passages.Back: In the back, we have stiffness and lameness. This is most noticeable on beginning to move, but wears off on moving about. Pains in the shoulder with stiffness; pains between the shoulders on swallowing food; rheumatic symptoms; painful tension between the shoulder blades. The small of the back aches while sitting. Painful stiffness on rising from a seat; pain in the back as if bruised, sore and lame all over the back. The pain in the back is ameliorated by lying on something hard or from exercise.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: There are violent pains in the back, especially in the lumbar region, as if the back were broken. It is a remedy for lumbago brought on from getting wet, from overlifting, from taking cold, and from suppressing the sweat. He is ameliorated from motion and from moving about; worse on beginning to move.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Violent tenesmus of the bladder with dribbling of blood; retention of urine; urine is voided slowly from paralytic weakness of the bladder. There is sometimes complete paralysis of the bladder with involuntary urination at night in bed.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: Frequent urging to urinate day and night; weakness of the bladder in girls and women with frequent desire to urinate, especially in the women dribbling of the urine in cold air and on becoming very cold.
rubric_passages.Chest: Inflammation of the lungs; inflammation of the pleura with stitching pains, much fever, progressing toward the typhoid state with aching in the bones; restlessness; general amelioration from motion; intense fever, marked thirst, great prostration; typhoid symptoms. The pneumonia is of a low type; pneumonia such as would denominate typhoid.
rubric_passages.Chill: He knows that the chill is coming because of the dry, teasing cough; cough with taste of blood in the mouth; dry, hoarse, racking, rheumatic cough. cough from rheumatic fever.
rubric_passages.Extremities: There are stitching pains, pressing pains, all sorts of rheumatic lameness, and these pains are ameliorated from motion and are worse from keeping still. They are brought on from cold air and from suppressing the sweat, and as these pains grow worse they became tearing down the limbs, drawing pains.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis: It has paralysis of the limbs with loss of sensation. In infantile paralysis Rhus is a very common remedy. The nurses take the infants to the park, take them out of their carriage and put them down upon the cold damp ground and in a few days the child comes down with infantile paralysis. Rhus will cure these cases because the symptoms take the Rhus type.
rubric_passages.Extremities, paralysis, painless: It has paralysis of the limbs with loss of sensation.
rubric_passages.Generalities: The complaints of this remedy come on from cold damp weather, from being exposed to cold damp air when perspiring. The patient is sensitive to cold air and all his complaints are made worse from cold and all are better from warmth. In a general way, the aching pains, the bruised feelings over the body, restlessness throughout the limbs, and amelioration from motion are features that prevail throughout all conditions of Rhus.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Burning and rawness in the larynx.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness, enervation: While he is better from motion and better from walking, if he continues to walk he becomes exhausted. Any continued exertion of the body or mind exhausts the Rhus patient.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: In the female we have the same symptoms, especially erysipelatous swelling of the genitals and some eruptions. The woman has prolapsus of the uterus from straining or lifting; weakness of all the pelvic muscles; labor-like pains in the abdomen from straining.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Copious menstrual flow; clotted blood with labor-like pains. The menstrual period comes too soon, is too profuse, and lasts too long. The flow is acrid, causing excoriation of the parts.
rubric_passages.Head: The headaches are commonly such as occur in fevers, in rheumatism, and in inflammation of the bladder. The brain feels loose or there is an undulating feeling in the head. Pain in the head as if the brain were torn. Stupefying headache with buzzing in the ears. Stitching pains in the head; feeling as if the parts were screwed together; feeling as if the brain were pressed.
rubric_passages.Mind: Most of the mental symptoms of Rhus are such as prevail during low forms of fever, especially in typhoid. There is then incoherent talking; answers questions hastily. There is anxiety, apprehensions, and fear. Intense fear at night. The complaints of Rhus often come on in the night. The mental symptoms are worse at night. The delirium is worse at night.
rubric_passages.Mind, irritability: Irritability and anxiety as if he had met with some misfortune, restlessness, anxiousness and nervous in the extreme in acute and chronic complaints.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Irritability and anxiety as if he had met with some misfortune, restlessness, anxiousness and nervous in the extreme in acute and chronic complaints.
rubric_passages.Mind, restlessness, night: The fears and anxiety are worse at night.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The tongue is sore, raw, and bleeding; burning of all the tissues in the mouth; red tongue. The taste is putrid and metallic. The teeth are covered with blood; fever in the gums with blood; blisters upon the tongue and the whole mouth appears to be raw and sometimes bleeding.
rubric_passages.Mouth, dryness: Dryness of the mouth and throat with great thirst; unquenchable thirst for cold drinks especially at night with great dryness of the mouth.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Shooting pains in the rectum. It has cured hemorrhoids when there is great soreness and when they are internal or protruding; protruding after stool with pressing in the rectum.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Shooting pains in the rectum. Violent tenesmus; violent tearing, pinching pains in the abdomen; involuntary stools; dysenteric stools; dysenteric discharges that drive him out of bed in the morning sometimes as early as 4 o'clock.
rubric_passages.Respiration: Respiration is hurried; oppression of the chest; very difficult and hard breathing, especially in pneumonia and bronchitis and in colds that settle in the chest.
rubric_passages.Respiration, difficult: Respiration is hurried; oppression of the chest; very difficult and hard breathing, especially in pneumonia and bronchitis and in colds that settle in the chest. Rhus gets out of breath on exertion.
rubric_passages.Skin: Intolerable itching of the skin; tingling in the skin; eruptions burn and itch violently; much moisture with eruptions upon the skin. Large blisters form upon the skin either with or without erysipelas.

profile.personality: A chilly, sensitive individual who is highly reactive to environmental changes, particularly cold air and weather shifts. They tend to be sedentary, preferring stillness and regularity, as any irregularity in breathing or motion aggravates their complaints.
profile.mental_state: The mental picture is only partially developed, but shows sadness, low-spiritedness, and aversion to work. There is an irritable mental excitability, suggesting a nervous temperament that is easily overstimulated yet lacks the energy or motivation to engage productively.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional tone is one of quiet despondency and irritability. The patient is weighed down by a pervasive low mood and feels burdened by effort, retreating into passivity and withdrawal rather than expressing distress outwardly.

rubric_passages.Chest: A striking feature is pain under the clavicle; a sense of rawness under the clavicle; as if the parts inside were raw; as if the air came directly under the clavicle, producing rawness and burning.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Rumex is as sensitive to cold, to baths and chilly surroundings as Rhus, but it is aggravated by motion.
rubric_passages.Rectum: Stools, painless, offensive, profuse; brown or black, thin or watery; preceded by pain in abdomen; before stool sudden urging, driving him out of bed in morning.
rubric_passages.Skin: The yellow dock has been used in domestic practice, as a blood medicine, to cure eruptions and boils.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Rumex is one of the most valuable palliatives in advanced phthisis it will often carry a case through another winter. With Rumex, Pulsatilla, Senega, Arsenic and Nux vomica you can patch up the last years of a phthisical patient.
Aching pain in the pit of stomach gradually becoming very severe; sharp stitching pains in stomach extending into chest, and below a sensation of pressure like a lump in pit of stomach, sometimes rising up under sternum, greatly aggravated from motion and somewhat from taking a long breath; generally aggravated after eating, ameliorated by lying perfectly quiet.
The most violent cough occurs a few moments after lying down and at night, in some cases, complete aphonia.
rubric_passages.Generalities, morning: In the morning hurried to stool like Sulphur.
rubric_passages.Generalities, eating: Aching pain in the pit of stomach gradually becoming very severe; sharp stitching pains in stomach extending into chest, and below a sensation of pressure like a lump in pit of stomach, sometimes rising up under sternum, greatly aggravated from motion and somewhat from taking a long breath; generally aggravated after eating, ameliorated by lying perfectly quiet.
rubric_passages.Generalities, lying: The most violent cough occurs a few moments after lying down and at night, in some cases, complete aphonia.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea: Extreme rawness in the larynx and trachea; burning and smarting; unable to endure pressure on the throat pit.
rubric_passages.Cough: Every breath of air causes a spasmodic cough.
rubric_passages.Cough, dry: It also has marked dryness of the larynx and trachea with hard, dry, spasmodic cough.
rubric_passages.Expectoration: The early expectoration is thin mucus, and then it becomes thicker and tenacious, and he cannot expectorate it; he hears the rattle, after many efforts which exhaust him; he expectorates a little with hardly any relief.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain, burning: Rawness and burning from the inhalation of air.
rubric_passages.Cough, tickling: Tickling in the throat pit causing cough.
rubric_passages.Generalities, night: The most violent cough occurs a few moments after lying down and at night, in some cases, complete aphonia.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, irritation, larynx: Catarrhal headache with great irritation of the larynx and trachea, clavicular pain and soreness behind sternum.
rubric_passages.Rectum, diarrhea: Morning diarrhea with cough from tickling in throat pit.
rubric_passages.Rectum, diarrhea, morning: Brown, watery diarrhoea, chiefly in morning, having stools from 5 to 9 A.M.
rubric_passages.Skin, eruptions: The yellow dock has been used in domestic practice, as a blood medicine, to cure eruptions and boils.
rubric_passages.Clinical, inflammation: The inflammation passes to the smallest bronchi, producing a capillary bronchitis and finally a pneumonia.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, irritation: Catarrhal headache with great irritation of the larynx and trachea, clavicular pain and soreness behind sternum.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, tickling: Tickling in the throat pit causing cough.
rubric_passages.Rectum, morning: Before stool sudden urging, driving him out of bed in morning.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, larynx in general: Tenacious mucus in throat or larynx, constant desire to hawk.
rubric_passages.Larynx and trachea, trachea in general: Soreness, rawness and burning, especially down the trachea and under the sternum.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain, sides: Shooting from pit of stomach to chest; sharp pain in left chest; slight nausea; dull aching in forehead.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain, sides, inhalation: Rawness and burning from the inhalation of air.

profile.personality: The Ruta personality is fundamentally irritable, inclined to contradict and quarrel, with a dissatisfied disposition toward both self and others. They are restless individuals who cannot keep still, driven by a nervous restlessness similar to Rhus, yet carrying a deeper chronic weariness from prolonged overexertion.
profile.mental_state: The mental symptoms are not strongly differentiated but center on a general dissatisfaction and inclination toward contradiction. There is a melancholy disposition that worsens toward evening, accompanied by mental dejection and a sense of despondency. The mind reflects the same exhaustion seen in the body — a slow, chronic depletion from sustained overuse rather than acute crisis.
profile.emotional_pattern: The core emotional pattern is one of low-spirited anxiety combined with irritability, creating a person who is both dejected and combative. There is a deepening melancholy as evening approaches, suggesting emotional reserves that drain over the course of the day. The despondency reflects an inner sense of being worn down and unable to fully recover, mirroring the remedy's physical theme of slow repair and persistent soreness.

rubric_passages.Back: It is a decided rheumatic remedy. All those remedies which are susceptible to cold, aggravated by cold, wet, stormy weather, are described as rheumatic remedies. Rheumatic symptoms of the back.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: "Pains as if bruised in lumbar vertebrae." "Pain in back or coccyx as from a fall or blow, or as if bruised."
rubric_passages.Extremities: "Hamstrings feel shortened and weak; knees give way going up or down stairs." "Pain and lameness in the ankles after sprain or dislocation." "Lameness after sprains, especially of the wrists and ankles."
rubric_passages.Generalities: Ruta is aggravated from cold, wants everything warm. It is sensitive to cold, aggravated from cold, damp weather; aggravated from becoming cold, and the complaints are often brought on from straining the part; overstraining or overexertion of parts.
rubric_passages.Head: Headache follows. Here Argentum nitricum resembles Ruta.
rubric_passages.Mind: "Inclination to contradict and quarrel." "Dissatisfied with himself and others." "Anxious and low-spirited, with mental dejection."
rubric_passages.Rectum: "Frequent unsuccessful urging with prolapsus ani." "Protrusion of rectum after confinement. Pain in rectum when sitting. Great soreness in rectum as from ulceration. It is a useful remedy in piles and stricture of the rectum."
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Constipation is a striking feature, with prolapsus of the rectum at stool.
rubric_passages.Rectum, pain: Pain in rectum when sitting. Great soreness in rectum as from ulceration.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Ruta is a painful medicine, but is slow in producing symptoms, hence it of a chronic nature. Old neuralgias, stinging, tearing, burning pains, especially in the lower extremities, about the eyes; faceaches. It has all the pains, described by all the adjectives that apply to pain, but it is worse lying down and worse from cold.
rubric_passages.Clinical, paralysis: Paralysis of certain muscles of the eye, even strabismus; all sorts of disturbances of accommodation. Paralytic weakness in the lower extremities after a sprain of the back.
rubric_passages.Generalities, weakness: There is general exhaustion in Ruta. The legs give out on rising from a chair, the patient totters and makes several efforts on rising from a seat.
rubric_passages.Clinical: "Bruises and other mechanical injuries of bones and periosteum; sprains; periostitis; erysipelas." Ruta is a great remedy for a mere sprain; it has all the soreness and weakness of tendons.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Overstraining of the muscles of the eye. These muscles are largely tendinous. Continual use until it becomes an overuse. Eyestrain followed by headache, and the effects are also; on the globe of the eye, and coating of the eye, so that the overstrained eye is red.

profile.personality: The Sabadilla patient is a chilly, hypersensitive individual who craves warmth in all forms—hot drinks, hot air, warm wrappings. They are deeply susceptible to environmental stimuli, particularly odors, and even the mere thought of certain triggers can provoke physical symptoms. There is a marked tendency toward nervousness, hysteria, and an unbalanced mental state accompanied by various nervous manifestations.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dominated by erroneous impressions and fixed delusions about the body—imagining limbs are crooked, the chin elongated, the body withering or shrunken, or believing oneself pregnant from mere flatus. Mental exertion aggravates symptoms and paradoxically induces sleepiness; the patient falls asleep while meditating or reading. Thinking itself worsens complaints, and there is a stupefying quality to the headaches and mental fog, particularly in feeble, overtaxed children.
profile.emotional_pattern: The emotional life is colored by groundless fears and imaginary suffering—the patient believes in horrible diseases and fatal outcomes with no objective basis, yet the distress is more intense than if real pathology existed. There is a hysterical quality with convulsive tremblings and cataleptic episodes, and the patient often receives no sympathy from others because the suffering appears unfounded. Appetite and desire fluctuate between complete aversion and sudden hunger once eating begins, reflecting the same pattern of emotional instability between disgust and engagement.

rubric_passages.Chill: The Sabadilla patient is a shivering patient, sensitive to the cold air, a cold room, cold food. He wants to be well wrapped up; wants hot drinks to warm up his stomach.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Imagines the body is withering, that the limbs are crooked
rubric_passages.Generalities: The Sabadilla patient is a shivering patient, sensitive to the cold air, a cold room, cold food. He wants to be well wrapped up; wants hot drinks to warm up his stomach. He is subject to catarrhal conditions, and in these he wants hot air.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: sensation of great rawness in the nose; burning
rubric_passages.Head: Dizziness; vertigo. He wakens up at night with vertigo. Vertigo, in the open air; under all sorts of circumstances. Full of headaches. Headaches on one side of the head. The meditation which drives him to sleep brings on headache.
rubric_passages.Mind: Many of the annoyances of this individual seem to be imaginary. His mind is filled with strange things. Imaginations concerning persons or himself are strange. Imagines the body is withering, that the limbs are crooked, that the chin is elongated, and larger on one side than the other.
rubric_passages.Rectum: A routine remedy in pin worms, seat worms, all sorts of worms stomach and tape worms.
rubric_passages.Sleep: A sleepiness comes on from thinking, meditating, reading. While meditating in a chair he falls asleep like Nux moschata and Phosphoric acid.
rubric_passages.Sleep, sleepiness: A sleepiness comes on from thinking, meditating, reading. While meditating in a chair he falls asleep like Nux moschata and Phosphoric acid.
rubric_passages.Stomach: The appetite is singular; it is commonly seen in pregnant women. She says she is never hungry; never wants anything to eat, and often there is an aversion to food; but when, from a matter of reason, she concludes to eat, and she takes a mouthful, it tastes good, it recalls the appetite, and she makes a good meal.
rubric_passages.Appetite, increased (hunger in general): Morbid hunger or loathing for food.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: Morbid hunger or loathing for food.
rubric_passages.Appetite, aversion, meat: Disgust for all food, for meat, for sour things, for coffee, for garlic.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Cutting pains, as from knives, in ovary.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning: sensation of great rawness in the nose; burning
rubric_passages.Appetite: She says she is never hungry; never wants anything to eat, and often there is an aversion to food; but when, from a matter of reason, she concludes to eat, and she takes a mouthful, it tastes good, it recalls the appetite, and she makes a good meal. At other times not only a loss of appetite, but a disgust and loathing of food.
rubric_passages.Appetite, ravenous: Morbid hunger or loathing for food.
rubric_passages.Appetite, aversion: Disgust for all food, for meat, for sour things, for coffee, for garlic.
rubric_passages.Appetite, desires: He wants to be well wrapped up; wants hot drinks to warm up his stomach.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Cutting pains, as from knives, in ovary.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: Headache in school girls. Feeble children, who have to be taken from school because of headache, come home with strange imaginations concerning school and themselves. Headache stupefying and associated with coryza; in the frontal sinuses, above the eyes. Fullness, bursting, stupefying, aggravated by jarring, sneezing, walking. Stupefying headaches with coryza. Often gets up with it in the morning, increases during the forenoon.
rubric_passages.Appetite, wanting: She says she is never hungry; never wants anything to eat, and often there is an aversion to food.
rubric_passages.Throat: The catarrhal conditions of the throat require hot drinks and food. Warm things are grateful to him. It is difficult to swallow cold things; they increase the pain and difficulty in swallowing.
rubric_passages.Mind, dullness: Mental exertion aggravates the headache and produces sleep.

profile.personality: The Sabina constitution is a plethoric, full-blooded individual prone to circulatory turmoil and venous congestion. They are heat-sensitive, wanting open air and windows open, unable to tolerate warm rooms or excess clothing. They tend to build up to a state of apparent robustness only to be broken down by acute hemorrhagic episodes.
profile.mental_state: The mental state is characterized by acute suffering and distress, particularly during hemorrhagic or inflammatory crises, with violent pains that cause the patient to cry out. There is a restless urgency driven by intense physical sensations of fullness, throbbing, and burning throughout the body. The mind is dominated by the physical turmoil rather than displaying independent psychological pathology.
profile.emotional_pattern: Emotionally, the Sabina patient is reactive and expressive under suffering, screaming out from sudden knife-like shooting pains. There is a pattern of alternating states—periods of apparent recovery and plethoric well-being giving way to exhaustion and anemia after hemorrhagic episodes. The emotional life mirrors the physical cycle of building up and breaking down, with acute distress during crises and relative calm between them.

rubric_passages.Back: Violent pain in the sacrum, to the uterus or pubes.
rubric_passages.Back, pain: Aching in the sacrum. as if broken, as if the bones would separate. Most violent, tearing, rending, burning pains, with throbbing in the sacrum.
rubric_passages.Bladder: Great burning and throbbing. Severe suffering, attended with inflammatory symptoms; bloody urine; inflammation of the bladder with continuous urging to urinate, with the general aggravation from heat and the throbbing all over.
rubric_passages.Extremities: Much rheumatism and gout; gouty nodosities in the joints; they burn so and are so hot that the patient is compelled to put the hands or feet out of bed.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Sabina establishes a turmoil in the circulatory system, with violent pulsations all over the body. The patient is disturbed by heat, is worse in a warm room or from too much clothing. Wants the windows open and to be in the open air.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female: The most important sphere is in menstrual symptoms, and its relation to uterine hemorrhage. In the menstrual symptoms the woman suffers from bearing down, labor-like pains. Most distressing in dysmenorrhoea.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, pain: Another striking feature is itching, shooting, knife-like pains, causing the patient to scream out, shooting up the vagina to the uterus, or up as far as the umbilicus. These two features, shooting pains from the back to the front and from. below upwards, with hemorrhages, are striking corroborations.
rubric_passages.Head: No specific passage found.
rubric_passages.Rectum: The principal action is on the lower bowel, about the anus. Hoemorrhoidal tumors which bleed copiously. Constipation with bleeding hemorrhoids. A sense of fullness in these parts.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, pain: Contractive labor-like pains extending from back to pubes and great urging to urinate.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: Most violent, tearing, rending, burning pains, with throbbing in the sacrum, with burning and throbbing all over the body, especially throbbing in parts, whether it be the uterus or bladder.
rubric_passages.Clinical: Belladonna and Sabina are the two most important remedies in abortion at three months.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, uterus: Inflammation of the ovaries or uterus after abortion or premature labor. Violent pains through ovaries and uterus.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: A sense of fullness in all the veins of the body, a sense of distension, fullness, puffiness, bloating, with pulsations all over, associated with repeated hemorrhages from the mucous membranes.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: Sabina establishes a turmoil in the circulatory system, with violent pulsations all over the body. It has a decided effect in diminishing knots, enlargements, or varices in veins.
rubric_passages.Genitalia female, menses: Menses too profuse, too early, last too long, partly fluid, partly clotted and offensive; flow in paroxysms; with colic and labor-like pains; pains from sacrum to pubes.
rubric_passages.Generalities, bones: Aching in the sacrum. as if broken, as if the bones would separate.
rubric_passages.Generalities, bones, pain: Aching in the sacrum. as if broken, as if the bones would separate.
rubric_passages.Abdomen, distension: A sense of fullness in all the veins of the body, a sense of distension, fullness, puffiness, bloating, with pulsations all over.
rubric_passages.Back, pain, sacral region: pain extending from sacrum or lumbar region to pubes, with severe bearing down, extending from lower part of back around abdomen and down thighs.
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: Much rheumatism and gout; gouty nodosities in the joints; they burn so and are so hot that the patient is compelled to put the hands or feet out of bed.

profile.personality: A chilly, cold-sensitive individual prone to periodic patterns and routine suffering, often pale-faced with a tendency toward chronic catarrhal conditions. They are deeply affected by environmental changes—drafts, damp weather, seasonal shifts—and are hypersensitive to flowers, odors, and sensory stimuli.
profile.mental_state: The mental state is characterized by a surface-level engagement with illness rather than deep constitutional disturbance, with anxiety preceding episodes of vomiting and prostration. There is a general mental dullness and withdrawal during acute episodes, particularly the weekly sick headaches that drive the patient to seek darkness, quiet, and stillness.
profile.emotional_pattern: The emotional pattern centers on a recurring cycle of building distress followed by temporary relief—mirroring the physical pattern of mounting headache resolved by vomiting, or accumulating stomach disorder suddenly discharged by gushing diarrhea. There is a pervasive false hunger or inner emptiness that is not satisfied by external nourishment, with aversion at the thought and smell of food despite a gnawing, sinking faintness.

rubric_passages.Chest: Chest troubles come on and grow worse and worse. Its ability to palliate phthisis is very well known. A patient much debilitated with bronchial catarrh; susceptible to cold, to every change in the weather, from change to damp weather, to every draft, to change of clothing; always taking new "cold."
rubric_passages.Extremities: If the patient suffers when he goes to bed with hot palms and soles, so that he must put them out of bed, this is an additional striking feature.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Blood root is an old domestic remedy. A great many eastern farmers wives will not go into the winter without blood root in the house. In the cold winter days, when the coryzas come on, a "cold" in the head, throat and chest, then they get the blood root ready and make a tea of it.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning, internally: There is burning in the chest behind the sternum; thick, tough, ropy expectoration; spasmodic cough, and every cough ends in belching; eructations of gas; empty eructations.
rubric_passages.Head: Periodic headaches, when the headache comes once in seven days it begins in the morning on waking or wakes the patient up. It begins in the occiput and travels upward and settles over the right eye and in the right temple.
rubric_passages.Mouth: Tongue red and burns as if in contact with something hot. Burning in pharynx and oesophagus, burning in roof of mouth.
rubric_passages.Rectum: This burning extends all through the bowels; burning in the abdomen and stomach in old gastric troubles; vomiting of even a teaspoonful of water with burning; old gastric irritation; dyspepsia; all sorts of disorders of the stomach.
rubric_passages.Stomach: Nausea not relieved by vomiting. Keeps on vomiting and retching. Burns as if on fire. Arsenic is often given by mistake, because of the great burning.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations: Belching up of acrid fluids in asthma; hay asthma. Sanguinaria palliates asthma associated with stomach disorders.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain: All sorts of neuralgic pains; cutting, tearing, lacerating pains; as if the muscles were torn, or put on a stretch. Tearing pains anywhere, neuralgic or rheumatic.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, burning: Dryness and burning in the larynx, with hoarseness; dryness and burning throughout the chest, with asthma; associated with burning of the palms and soles.
rubric_passages.Head, congestion: When the headache is present it seems to be a general congestive headache; although beginning in the morning, coming up the back and extending to the right eye, the whole head is hot and aches.
rubric_passages.Appetite: With the headache and many complaints Sanguinaria has a faintness; like a hunger, yet not for food. A sinking, faint, "all gone, empty feeling."
rubric_passages.Clinical: I remember a case in which the patient missed his Sanguinaria headache and an epithelioma developed, which was cured by Phosphorus. I am convinced that if Phosphorus had been given at the end of the attack the cancer would not have developed, as Phosphorus was his constitutional remedy.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: In the chest complaints Sanguinaria has a circumscribed red spot over the malar bones, such as seen in hectic patients.
rubric_passages.Chest, pain: Patient suddenly taken to bed with a chill; burning in the chest symptoms of pneumonia; rusty expectoration; violent cough; every cough felt as a concussion at the bifurcation of the trachea; as if a knife were in the parts; as if torn asunder.
rubric_passages.Face: While Ferrum has a uniformly red, plethoric face, Sanguinaria has a pale face. In the chest complaints Sanguinaria has a circumscribed red spot over the malar bones, such as seen in hectic patients.
"Distressing, dry, spasmodic, exhaustive coughs, especially in children; worse towards night, lying down, going into a cold room to sleep, feeling of rawness and burning in bronchi."
rubric_passages.Head, heat: When the headache is present it seems to be a general congestive headache; although beginning in the morning, coming up the back and extending to the right eye, the whole head is hot and aches.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: "Periodic sick headache; begins in the morning, increases during the day, lasts till evening; head feels as if it must burst, or as if eyes would be pushed out; throbbing, lancinating pains through brain, worse on the right side, especially in the forehead and vertex; followed by chills, nausea, vomiting of food or bile; must lie down or remain quiet; ameliorated by sleep."
rubric_passages.Appetite, wanting: Sanguinaria has a hunger, but it is not for food; aversion at the thought and smell of food.
rubric_passages.Stomach, eructations, empty: and after the cough copious, loud, empty eructations. No other remedy has this.
rubric_passages.Throat: Chronic catarrh of the throat apparent thickening of the mucous membranes of the throat. Nose and pharynx fill with mucus. He hawks it out; there is a dry burning sensation, but the burning is most marked every time he takes a fresh cold.
rubric_passages.Generalities, lying: It gets worse during the day and is aggravated by light, so that he is driven into a dark room and compelled to lie down.
rubric_passages.Generalities, pain, pressing: "Headache as if forehead would burst with chill, and burning in stomach." "Periodic sick headache; begins in the morning, increases during the day, lasts till evening; head feels as if it must burst, or as if eyes would be pushed out."
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: Pain streaks up the neck; pain in the deltoid. It prefers the right side, but also cures the left side. Rheumatic pains in the right shoulder so that he cannot raise the arm, and all the muscles of the neck and back of the neck become involved; stiff neck.
rubric_passages.Eye: "Headache over right eye." "Periodic sick headache; begins in the morning, increases during the day, lasts till evening; head feels as if it must burst, or as if eyes would be pushed out."

profile.personality: A profoundly weakened, prematurely aged constitution marked by sluggishness and deterioration of both mind and body. The Sarsaparilla type is the person who appears decades older than their actual age — enfeebled, tottering, shrivelled — often as a result of chronic disease, excess, or suppressed conditions. They present a picture of deep constitutional breakdown where all organs and tissues have become flabby, congested, and slow.
profile.mental_state: The mind is dazed, slow, and unable to comprehend, reflecting a weakness that borders on imbecility. There is a persistent dreamlike feeling, as if living in a fog, accompanied by progressive memory loss. Mental prostration parallels the physical decline, with diminished capacity for focused thought or clear reasoning.
profile.emotional_pattern: A state of deep weariness and resignation pervades the emotional life, with the patient always tired and full of distress, particularly at night. There is an underlying anxiety tied to physical suffering — the child who screams in anticipation of pain exemplifies the dread and helplessness characteristic of this remedy. Financial worry and the burden of chronic illness compound the emotional exhaustion, producing a person who has given up fighting their deterioration.

rubric_passages.Bladder: Catarrh of the bladder and kidneys.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, frequent: must pass urine several times in a night; urine thick and cloudy after standing; but clear when first passed
rubric_passages.Chest: suffocation on the least exertion; always tired
rubric_passages.Extremities: Oedema of tissues, of lower extremities, pitting on pressure dropsical conditions; Bright's disease.
rubric_passages.Generalities: Weakness over the whole body; a paralytic feeling.
rubric_passages.Head: feeling on the top of the head as if struck with a hammer
rubric_passages.Mind: In the mental sphere it manifests itself in a dazed state, he is unable to comprehend, the mind is slow, it is a weakness bordering on imbecility, which in the end it may reach.
rubric_passages.Mouth: The throat, tongue, and mouth look as if about to ulcerate; purple spots look as if they would break down, but remain intact for weeks and months.
rubric_passages.Rectum: during stool, violent tearing, cutting, in the rectum.
rubric_passages.Rectum, constipation: Obstinate constipation with violent urging to urinate; urging top stool with contraction of the intestines; excessive pressure from above downward, as if the bowels were pressing out
rubric_passages.Skin: Moist, itching, scurfy, and scabby eruptions. The skin of the backs and the palms of the hands becomes thick and indurated with a bran like scurf resembling psoriasis, intermingling with blue spots.
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination: There is a spasmodic condition of the sphincter when sitting to urinate, which makes the act impossible in that position, but when he stands up the urine flows freely.
rubric_passages.Generalities, side: sudden paralytic weakness of left arm and leg, passed off in three hours leaving a numbness in left hand and a tearing pain in left side of face and head
rubric_passages.Clinical: This medicine has many times dissolved a stone in the bladder; it so changes the character of the urine that it is no longer possible for the stone to build up, and it grows smaller by the continual dissolving off from the surface.
rubric_passages.Abdomen: Flatulence, continuous nausea, eructations and vomiting of sour food. Always complaining of fermentation and uneasiness of the stomach as if he had overeaten or as if the food had spoiled; digestion is slow and feeble.
rubric_passages.Heart & Circulation: the heart palpitates on exertion; suffocation on the least exertion
rubric_passages.Face: The face is often red and discolored in patches.
rubric_passages.Head, pain: feeling on the top of the head as if struck with a hammer
rubric_passages.Bladder, urination, retarded: Frequent ineffectual urging to urinate with diminished secretion,
rubric_passages.Extremities, pain: Sars. has gouty nodes with extreme soreness.
rubric_passages.Urine: I have seen the high colored, bloody, and mucous urine cleared up after the administration of Sars., but on standing, the sand would appear.
rubric_passages.Urine, color: urine thick and cloudy after standing; but clear when first passed
